summary.main_summary: This is a Confidentiality Agreement between Juris Precision Systems Inc. and Creative Studio, outlining the terms for handling confidential information and payment.
summary.tldr: This is a Confidentiality Agreement between Juris Precision Systems Inc.
key_points: Confidential Information includes proprietary data shared between the parties
Invoices must be paid within 30 days of receipt

risks.title: Confidentiality Breach
risks.description: Unauthorized disclosure of confidential information may result in legal action and damage to the parties' reputation.

risks.title: Non-Payment Risk
risks.description: Failure to pay invoices within 30 days may lead to penalties or termination of the agreement.

standard_clauses.title: Confidential Information
standard_clauses.content: Confidential Information refers to any proprietary data shared between the parties.

standard_clauses.title: Payment Terms
standard_clauses.content: All invoices must be paid within 30 days of receipt.

standard_clauses.title: Governing Law
standard_clauses.content: This agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware.
